# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-a
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-a
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-a
        image: my-service-a:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-b
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-b
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-b
        image: my-service-b:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 9090
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-c
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-c
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-c
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-c
        image: my-service-c:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 7070
